name: John Doe
history: Past experiences of pressure related to performance and social interactions. Reports presenting a confident front and hiding vulnerability. A recent business failure led to financial hardship.
intermediate_belief: If I show vulnerability, others will think less of me.
intermediate_belief_depression: I must handle everything on my own to avoid being seen as a failure.
coping_strategies: Avoids asking for help and tries to manage everything independently.
situation: Took out a loan instead of asking family or friends for help. In social situations, acts to distract attention from financial difficulties.
auto_thought: I can't let anyone know how bad things really are.
behavior: Avoids discussing financial issues with others and tries to maintain a facade of control.
